title: Smoky French Chicken Blanquette
description: A rich and creamy dish inspired by French cuisine, featuring smoky chicken and blanquette sauce.
instructions: Season the chicken with smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken until browned on both sides, about 5-6 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook the chicken for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside to rest.
In the same skillet, add the flour and whisk to combine with the remaining butter. Cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Gradually pour in the heavy cream, whisking continuously to avoid lumps. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Stir in the Gruyère cheese until melted and smooth. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Slice the cooked chicken and serve with the blanquette sauce spooned over the top.
